name: Upload progress (React)
algorithm: An injected upload(onProgress, signal) function drives a determinate progressbar. onProgress rounds to an integer percent, updates aria-valuenow and the fill width, and announces throttled milestones (at most once per announceEvery). Completion forces a final announce; an AbortController cancel is recognised via signal.aborted to yield a cancelled state with Retry; real rejections become an error state.
reduced_motion: Bar fill width transition removed under prefers-reduced-motion; the bar still updates to the correct value.
responsive_behaviour: fluid up to 28rem; track flexes; cancel button keeps a 44px target; no fixed pixel motion
browser_support: All modern browsers; SSR-guarded idempotent style injection; uses AbortController.
accessibility: role=progressbar with aria-valuemin/max/now and aria-valuetext; separate polite role=status carries throttled milestones; terminal events always announce; Cancel/Retry are 44px focusable buttons; focus never stolen.
